installedPlugins.name: AdvancedRefinery
installedPlugins.title: AdvancedRefinery
installedPlugins.description: Converts a small furnace (while you look at it) into a refinery: unlocks slots for wood, low grade, and diesel, then on a timer burns wood + LGF to craft diesel barrels. Requires permission advancedrefinery.use; use /refineryadd. Config: LowGradePerDiesel, Multiplier, TickRate.

installedPlugins.name: AdvertMessages
installedPlugins.title: Advert Messages
installedPlugins.description: Rotating server messages broadcast to everyone in chat on a timer. Admins set the message list, interval, and random vs sequential order in the plugin config. Players do not use a command—they only see the adverts.

installedPlugins.name: AlwaysDay
installedPlugins.title: Always Day
installedPlugins.description: Locks server time so daylight (or your chosen time) stays put—no player commands; it’s all server-side config.

installedPlugins.name: AlwaysHotSpot
installedPlugins.title: AlwaysHotSpot
installedPlugins.description: Harmony mod that guarantees you trigger a hot spot every time you hit trees and ore nodes—passive farming QoL, no chat commands.

installedPlugins.name: AutoAdd
installedPlugins.title: AutoAdd
installedPlugins.description: QoL for furnaces, campfires, and BBQs: tap icons to pull ore/wood and start smelting (green = load & cook, red = pull outputs). Needs permission autoadd.allow; Image Library required. Works with Furnace Splitter / Simple Splitter when present.

installedPlugins.name: AutoCodeLock
installedPlugins.title: AutoCodeLock
installedPlugins.description: Auto-place codelocks on doors, boxes, lockers, and TCs; set default and guest codes; optional door closers; full settings UI. Requires the Chaos extension. Permission-gated per feature.

installedPlugins.name: Backpacks
installedPlugins.title: Backpacks
installedPlugins.description: Extra backpack inventory beyond your hotbar/belt—open, page, and fetch items via chat (exact commands depend on config and permissions).

installedPlugins.name: BetterLoot
installedPlugins.title: BetterLoot
installedPlugins.description: Rebuilt loot system: crate/barrel/entity drops are defined and balanced in config—what you find in the world is tuned server-side (not a player slash command).

installedPlugins.name: BetterNoWorkbench
installedPlugins.title: Better No Workbench
installedPlugins.description: Players with BetterNoWorkbench.on get workbench Tier 3 crafting (or Tier 1–2 per config) without standing at a bench—server QoL.

installedPlugins.name: BetterSentryTurrets
installedPlugins.title: BetterSentryTurrets
installedPlugins.description: Deployable sentry that can act as a normal Auto Turret or a SAM site depending on config. Permission sentryturrets.admin for the chat command.

installedPlugins.name: BGrade
installedPlugins.title: BGrade
installedPlugins.description: Upgrade building blocks with a command (common: /bgrade) instead of hammer cycling—speed-build QoL.

installedPlugins.name: BlueprintManager
installedPlugins.title: Blueprint Manager
installedPlugins.description: Control which blueprints players know—unlock, lock, or manage learn states (admin-focused; exact commands in plugin docs).

installedPlugins.name: BuildingGrades
installedPlugins.title: Building Grades
installedPlugins.description: Building grade tweaks and automation—how walls/floors upgrade is governed by config and permissions.

installedPlugins.name: BuildingWorkbench
installedPlugins.title: Building Workbench
installedPlugins.description: Workbench-related building rules—ties crafting tiers to workbench presence or placement (see uMod page for your version).

installedPlugins.name: ChaosNPC
installedPlugins.title: ChaosNPC
installedPlugins.description: Extension/API for custom AI NPCs used by other k1lly0u plugins—not a player feature by itself. Admins: extension chat /chaosnpc.wipenpcs; console chaosnpc.version, chaosnpc.update, chaosnpc.wipenpcs.

installedPlugins.name: ChatClear
installedPlugins.title: Chat Clear
installedPlugins.description: Clears in-game chat for everyone or selected players (admin/moderation tool).

installedPlugins.name: Clans
installedPlugins.title: Clans
installedPlugins.description: Clans with alliances, invites, and shared play—chat commands for clan management (/clan etc.; see uMod for full list).

installedPlugins.name: CompoundOptions
installedPlugins.title: Compound Options
installedPlugins.description: Customize safe zone / compound behaviour (vendors, damage rules, etc.) via config.

installedPlugins.name: CopyPaste
installedPlugins.title: Copy Paste
installedPlugins.description: Copy and paste bases and structures—powerful admin build tool (paste files, offsets, rotation).

installedPlugins.name: CraftingController
installedPlugins.title: Crafting Controller
installedPlugins.description: Adjust craft times, blocked items, and crafting rules globally or per permission.

installedPlugins.name: DeathNotes
installedPlugins.title: Death Notes
installedPlugins.description: Kill feed messages in chat: who killed whom, weapon, distance—readable PvP/PvE feedback.

installedPlugins.name: DoorControl
installedPlugins.title: Door Control
installedPlugins.description: A plugin that allows user, with granted permissions, to control the doors on their base via chat commands.

installedPlugins.name: DynamicCupShare
installedPlugins.title: DynamicCupShare
installedPlugins.description: Share TC auth, turrets, and code-lock access dynamically with clan, team, or friends—UI via /share. Requires Chaos extension. Admins: /shareplayer <steamid>, /dcsadmin.

installedPlugins.name: Friends
installedPlugins.title: Friends
installedPlugins.description: Friend lists for teaming and plugin integration—add/remove friends via chat commands.

installedPlugins.name: GatherManager
installedPlugins.title: Gather Manager
installedPlugins.description: Multiplier and bonus tuning for gathering (wood, ore, corpses, etc.)—rates are server config.

installedPlugins.name: InstantBarrel
installedPlugins.title: Instant Barrel
installedPlugins.description: Optional 1 HP barrels/signs and loot straight to inventory when destroyed. Permission InstantBarrel.on. Works with tools and optionally weapons (range in config).

installedPlugins.name: InstantSmelt
installedPlugins.title: Instant Smelt
installedPlugins.description: Faster or instant smelting in furnaces and similar—throughput controlled in config.

installedPlugins.name: ItemRetriever
installedPlugins.title: Item Retriever
installedPlugins.description: Retrieve items from unreachable places (stuck in world, invalid deployables)—player or admin recovery tool.

installedPlugins.name: Kits
installedPlugins.title: Kits
installedPlugins.description: Starter, VIP, and custom kits with cooldowns and permissions—typically /kit and /kit list.

installedPlugins.name: LockOnRockets
installedPlugins.title: LockOnRockets
installedPlugins.description: Smoke rockets become lock-on missiles (vehicles, heli, players, etc. per config). Optional /craft.lockon with lockonrockets.craft. Pair with loot that adds smoke rockets.

installedPlugins.name: MagicStack
installedPlugins.title: Magic Stack
installedPlugins.description: A plugin that allows players, with granted permissions, to stack deployables in their base, with the use of a chat command.

installedPlugins.name: NTeleportation
installedPlugins.title: NTeleportation
installedPlugins.description: Warps, homes, TPA, and admin teleports—large command set (/tp, /home, /tpr, etc.; permissions required).

installedPlugins.name: PlaneCrash
installedPlugins.title: PlaneCrash
installedPlugins.description: Callable cargo plane crash event: shoot down for loot, auto-timer, NPCs at crash site. Requires ChaosNPC. Commands: /callcrash, /callcrash help, coords or player name variants.

installedPlugins.name: PlayerList
installedPlugins.title: PlayerList
installedPlugins.description: List online players in chat or UI—lightweight who’s-on for players or staff.

installedPlugins.name: PowerlessTurrets
installedPlugins.title: Powerless Turrets
installedPlugins.description: Auto turrets (and related) can work without external power—base defence QoL.

installedPlugins.name: QuickSort
installedPlugins.title: Quick Sort
installedPlugins.description: Sort container and inventory items quickly via UI or commands (see plugin for your keybinds/commands).

installedPlugins.name: RandomResourceNode
installedPlugins.title: Random Resource Node
installedPlugins.description: Spawns one infinite ore vein at a random surface location inside a configured circle—timed event or always-on—with optional spawn announcements, map markers, discovery flare, and extra HQM while mining the active metal vein. No default player chat commands; staff use /rrn (permission randomresourcenode.admin).

installedPlugins.name: Recycle
installedPlugins.title: Recycle
installedPlugins.description: Recycler-style instant recycling from UI—turn junk into resources without running to monument recyclers.

installedPlugins.name: RemoverTool
installedPlugins.title: Remover Tool
installedPlugins.description: Remove your own building parts—toggle remover mode via the chat command set in oxide/config (default is often /remove). Refunds configurable.

installedPlugins.name: SignArtist
installedPlugins.title: Sign Artist
installedPlugins.description: Paint signs from URLs or image library—art and shop signs without external downloads for viewers.

installedPlugins.name: SimpleSplitter
installedPlugins.title: Simple Splitter
installedPlugins.description: High-performance furnace/oven splitter: mixed ore splitting, smelt speed tweaks, charcoal tuning. Permission simplesplitter.use.

installedPlugins.name: Skinner
installedPlugins.title: Skinner
installedPlugins.description: Skin items via skinbox UI—/skin, /sc, /si, /skinauto, team skins, imports, etc. (many commands; permissions gate each).

installedPlugins.name: SortButton
installedPlugins.title: Sort Button
installedPlugins.description: Adds sort controls to containers so you can order stacks quickly.

installedPlugins.name: SpawnHeli
installedPlugins.title: Spawn Heli
installedPlugins.description: Spawn, fetch, and despawn minicopter, scrap transport heli, and attack heli—the exact chat commands are set in oxide/config (SpawnHeli.json), with cooldowns and permissions per vehicle.

installedPlugins.name: StackModifier
installedPlugins.title: Stack Modifier
installedPlugins.description: Custom stack sizes and stacking behaviour (Harmony); includes optional GUI editor. Player-visible stacks; /stackmodifier is admin editor when enabled in config.

installedPlugins.name: TCManager
installedPlugins.title: TC Manager
installedPlugins.description: Tool cupboard management QoL—auth lists, limits, or bulk actions depending on version (check uMod).

installedPlugins.name: Trade
installedPlugins.title: Trade
installedPlugins.description: Safe player-to-player trading UI—invite, confirm, and exchange items without dropping on ground.

installedPlugins.name: TurretLoadouts
installedPlugins.title: Turret Loadouts
installedPlugins.description: Save and apply ammo/loadout presets for auto turrets—faster base defence setup.

installedPlugins.name: UpgradeWorkbenches
installedPlugins.title: UpgradeWorkbenches
installedPlugins.description: Upgrade workbench tiers in place or via rules defined in config—building progression QoL.

installedPlugins.name: WarriorCoins
installedPlugins.title: Warrior Coins
installedPlugins.description: Server economy (WC): timed passive earnings by permission tier, optional daily login bonus, player bounties on kills, /wc pay transfers, in-game /shop with item or command delivery and cooldowns, optional balance HUD, and /wcadmin shop editor for staff (warriorcoins.admin).

installedPlugins.name: WeaponModifier
installedPlugins.title: Weapon Modifier
installedPlugins.description: Staff-facing weapon tuning: magazine size, infinite ammo/condition, drop on death, craft preload/skin/condition. Uses /modify and /switchperm with permission (see Codefling docs).

installedPlugins.name: WheresMyCorpse
installedPlugins.title: Where's My Corpse
installedPlugins.description: After respawn (or on demand), shows direction and distance to your corpse so you can recover your loot.
